title: Building Strength
subtitle: Growth and responsiveness increase
description: By week 23, your baby continues to gain strength and responsiveness. Movements may feel stronger, and your baby may respond to sounds or touch from outside.
what_to_expect: Fetal movements become stronger and more responsive
Baby may react to sounds or external touch
You may feel more consistent movement patterns
care_tips: Maintain a balanced and nutrient-rich diet
Stay hydrated and follow regular routines
Engage in light exercise and maintain proper posture

medical_checkups.note: Monitoring continues as growth and responsiveness increase.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Tracks fetal growth and maternal health

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor may schedule glucose screening around this period based on your risk factors.

important_note: Increased responsiveness is a positive sign of neurological development.
reassurance: Your baby’s reactions and movements show steady and healthy progress.
medical_disclaimer: Follow your healthcare provider’s advice for all scheduled tests and monitoring.

diabetes.personalized_description: Blood sugar control becomes especially important as screening for gestational diabetes may occur.
diabetes.medical_focus: Glucose levels may be evaluated through screening tests.
diabetes.reassurance: Careful monitoring helps ensure a healthy progression.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron supports oxygen supply during increased growth and responsiveness.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be monitored during routine tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain your energy.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure supports proper circulation during this stage of growth.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring remains important during checkups.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support continued neurological and physical development.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during ongoing evaluations.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As responsiveness increases, managing multiple conditions requires steady and mindful care.
priority_tips: Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Small, consistent efforts support healthy development.
